title: مرسوم بقانون رقم (15) لسنة 1998 بالتصديق على الاتفاقية العربية لمكافحة الإرهاب
title_en: Legislative Decree No. (4) of 1998 approving the accession to the Convention against Torture and Other Cruel, Inhuman or Degrading Treatment or Punishment adopted by the United Nations General Assembly on 10 December 1984
